raw_text:
Extremely disappointed with @nuegoindia. I was standing at the pickup point mentioned in my booking, but instead of guiding me properly, the bus staff refused to help. When I called and requested them to wait for just a minute while I reached the exact spot, they simply hung up the call without even listening to what I was saying.
This kind of behavior is completely unacceptable. Passengers rely on your staff for guidance during boarding, not to be ignored or disconnected. If this is the level of customer service NueGo provides, it seriously needs improvement. I hope someone from your team looks into this and ensures other passengers don't face the same experience. @nuegoindia
